action: Prepared to re-initiate video generation for all genres, capture and save conv_ids as 'pending', and set up periodic status checks.

recipe.steps:
For each news genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather):
1. Generate a new AI video using Generate_video with the latest narration script and assigned avatar for the genre.
2. Save the conv_id returned from Generate_video under news_videos.{genre}.pending with status 'pending' using save_data_in_memory.

Upon successful video generation (i.e., conv_ids saved), initiate periodic status polling by calling the video status API for each conv_id every minute and update the status to 'success' upon completion.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Check the generation status of each news genre video using its conv_id and update to success when complete.
